title: Redwood Materials lays off 10% in restructuring to chase energy storage business
summary: Energy storage startup Redwood Materials is laying off 10% of its workforce as part of a restructuring to capitalize on growing demand in the energy storage market. The move reflects the company's strategic pivot to focus on its most promising business segment.
content: The company is restructuring some teams to accommodate a booming energy storage business, according to emails viewed by TechCrunch.

zh.title: 红木材料裁员10%重组，转向储能业务
zh.summary: 储能初创公司红木材料正在裁员10%作为重组的一部分，以抓住储能市场增长的机遇。这一举措反映了该公司战略的转向，专注于最有前景的业务部分。
